title: Diamond Piglins
description: Adds a new mob that drops unbreakable diamond gear!
body:
![Diamond Piglins Header](https://i.imgur.com/W2quO4P.png) Diamond Piglins is a very simple datapack that adds one new mob, the Diamond Piglin. When this new mob is killed, it will drop unbreakable diamond gear. This diamond gear will not take durability damage. This special diamond gear can also be upgraded to netherite. The Diamond Piglin is a special piglin with a unique fascination with diamonds. This piglin bears very unique diamond gear that is completely unbreakable. Upon death, the Diamond Piglin will drop this special gear. The unbreakable diamond gear the Diamond Piglin drops can be upgraded to netherite and will still retain its unbreakable properties. The Diamond Piglin has a chance to spawn in place of regular piglins.
